children.text: I am a Grade 7 student from China, and I am very busy this year.
children.cn: 我是一名来自中国的七年级 student，我今年非常忙碌。
children.statement: “and” 用于连接两个并列的句子。
children.explanation: and 在这里连接两个意义相关的分句。

children.text: This term, I study a wide range of subjects, including Chinese, history and maths.
children.cn: 这学期，我学习广泛的科目，包括语文、历史和数学。
children.notes: a wide range of 各种各样的；广泛的。
children.statement: “including” 在这里是介词，意为“包括”。
children.explanation: including 常用作介词，后接包括的内容。

children.text: Although I enjoy all my classes, English is undoubtedly my favourite subject.
children.cn: 尽管我喜欢所有的课程，但英语无疑是我最喜欢的科目。
children.notes: although 引导让步状语从句，意为“尽管”。
children.explanation: undoubtedly 是副词，修饰整个句子或系表结构。

children.text: I find it incredibly useful because it allows me to communicate with people worldwide.
children.cn: 我发现它极其有用，因为它让我能与全世界的人交流。
children.notes: allow sb. to do sth. 允许某人做某事；incredibly 极其地。
children.explanation: worldwide 在句中作状语，修饰动词 communicate。

children.text: Furthermore, my English teacher is excellent and always makes the lessons exciting.
children.cn: 此外，我的英语老师非常优秀，总是让课堂变得令人兴奋。
children.statement: “exciting” 用来形容某事令人兴奋。
children.explanation: exciting 用于描述事物的特征，excited 用于描述人的感受。

children.text: In the future, I hope to be a professional translator, so I work hard in every class.
children.cn: 将来，我希望能成为一名专业的翻译，所以我每节课都努力学习。
children.notes: hope to be... 希望成为...；professional 专业的。
